fields.title: switch agent ids from crypto.randomUUID to nanoid
fields.description: Install nanoid in extensions/tau, replace agent ID generation in src/agent/worker.ts, and adjust render truncation in src/agent/render.ts as needed. Run npm run gate before handoff.
fields.notes: Installed nanoid in extensions/tau, switched worker and submission IDs to nanoid(12), and removed 8-char truncation in agent render output so generated IDs display in full.
fields.close_reason: Implemented and validated with npm run gate in extensions/tau.
